name: Annual Filings & Good Standing
summary: Loss of good standing leads to fines or blocked deals.

description.risk: Failure to file required annual reports may result in loss of good standing or administrative dissolution.
description.impact: The entity's legal powers may be suspended, limiting ability to enforce contracts, access banking services, or transact. Reinstatement requires fees and penalties.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.pseudoFunction:
IF(
  (entity_status != 'Active' AND entity_status != 'Good Standing')
  OR
  (
    (annual_report_due_date < today)
    AND (annual_report_status != 'complete')
  )
)
red.humanReadable: Entity is NOT in good standing, OR annual report is past due and not filed.

yellow.label: Monitor — Due Soon
yellow.pseudoFunction:
IF(
  entity_status == 'Active'
  AND (annual_report_due_date - today) <= 45
  AND (annual_report_due_date - today) > 0
  AND compliance_filing_status_current_year != 'Completed'
)
yellow.humanReadable: Entity is in good standing but annual report due within 45 days and not yet filed.
yellow.openQuestion: Sheet uses 'entity_good_standing_status' in yellow logic but stored field is 'entity_status' — confirm these map to the same field.

green.label: Low Risk — Compliant
green.pseudoFunction:
entity_status IN ['Active', 'Good Standing']
AND (annual_report_due_date - today) > 45
AND annual_report_status == 'complete'
green.humanReadable: Entity is in good standing and annual report is filed and not due within 45 days.

dataPoints.description: Current legal status of the entity with the state of formation (e.g., Active, Not in Good Standing, Dissolved).

source.name: BP/DB
source.notes: BP data. Primary source of truth for entity status.

dataPoints.description: The date by which the current year's annual report must be filed with the state.
Whether the annual report for the current filing year has been completed.

source.name: BP/DB
source.notes: BP data captures LZ-filed reports. Need SOS scrape for reports filed outside LZ.

dataPoints.description: Derived field indicating whether the compliance obligation for the current year has been fulfilled.

red.headline: Your entity is not in good standing

openFlags.detail: Customers who file their own annual reports may show as 'not filed' if SOS scrape is delayed.
YELLOW logic references 'entity_good_standing_status' but stored field is 'entity_status'. Confirm these map to the same field.

surfaces.note: Displayed in the Risk Dashboard card and risk detail view. Red/Yellow states trigger action prompts.
Surfaced as a risk signal on the Account and Opportunity pages for agent outreach context.

notes.author: Kari McGlynn
notes.text: SOS scrape confirmed active for CA, TX, FL, NY. Remaining states in Q2 backlog.

notes.author: Rob Wegbrands
notes.text: Data gap: Customers who file their annual report themselves or through a third party may show as 'not filed' unless SOS scrape is active.

name: Operating Agreement Gaps
summary: Missing or outdated operating agreement creates ownership disputes and personal liability exposure.

description.risk: Entity has no operating agreement or one that predates major ownership/capital events.
description.impact: Disputes over profit distribution, decision-making authority, or buyout rights may require costly litigation to resolve.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No operating agreement exists, or existing one predates a major ownership change.

yellow.label: Monitor — Review Recommended
yellow.humanReadable: Operating agreement exists but is over 2 years old with no recent amendments.

green.label: Low Risk — Current
green.humanReadable: Operating agreement is current and up to date.

dataPoints.description: Whether a valid operating agreement exists in the entity's document vault.
Date the operating agreement was last executed or amended.

source.name: BP/DB
source.notes: Date captured when LZ drafts the OA. Self-uploaded documents may lack date metadata.

openFlags.detail: OAs uploaded by customers may lack execution date metadata, reducing confidence.

notes.author: Rob Wegbrands
notes.text: Data gap: Date may be missing for self-uploaded OAs.

name: Business Name Conflict
summary: Undetected trademark or name conflicts can result in forced rebrand or litigation.

description.risk: Business is operating under a name that conflicts with an existing federal or state trademark.
description.impact: Cease and desist, forced rebrand, potential damages.

red.label: High Risk — Conflict Detected
red.humanReadable: Active conflict or C&D detected.

yellow.label: Monitor — No Search on File
yellow.humanReadable: No trademark search on record or registration still pending.

green.label: Low Risk — Protected
green.humanReadable: Trademark registered with no conflicts detected.

dataPoints.description: Whether a conflicting mark has been identified via search or notice.
Whether the business has an active federal trademark registration.

name: Licenses & Permits
summary: Operating without required licenses or with lapsed permits creates regulatory and financial exposure.

description.risk: Entity is operating without required business license or with a lapsed permit.
description.impact: Fines, forced closure, or inability to operate in regulated industries.

red.label: High Risk — License Lapsed
red.humanReadable: Required license is expired or missing.

yellow.label: Monitor — Expiring Soon
yellow.humanReadable: License active but expiring within 60 days.

green.label: Low Risk — Current
green.humanReadable: All required licenses are active and not expiring soon.

dataPoints.description: Current status of all required business licenses and permits.

openFlags.detail: License data from municipalities is highly fragmented. Coverage incomplete for ~40% of jurisdictions.

notes.author: Rob Wegbrands
notes.text: Data gap: Coverage incomplete for municipalities with no API.

name: Entity Type & Tax Election
summary: Wrong entity structure or missed tax elections can result in unnecessary tax burden.

description.risk: Entity is structured in a way that creates unnecessary tax burden for the owner.
description.impact: Owner may be paying self-employment tax on income that could be sheltered via S-Corp election or other mechanisms.

red.label: High Risk — Missed Election
red.pseudoFunction: IF(entity_type == 'LLC' AND revenue > 75000 AND scorp_election_filed == false AND scorp_deadline_passed == true)
red.humanReadable: LLC with revenue over $75k that missed S-Corp election window.

yellow.label: Monitor — Election Window Open
yellow.pseudoFunction: IF(entity_type == 'LLC' AND revenue > 50000 AND scorp_election_filed == false AND days_until_scorp_deadline <= 30)
yellow.humanReadable: LLC approaching S-Corp election window with meaningful revenue.

green.label: Low Risk — Optimized
green.humanReadable: Tax structure is optimized or revenue too low to benefit from S-Corp.

dataPoints.description: Legal entity type (LLC, Corp, Sole Prop, etc.)
Self-reported or estimated annual revenue for the entity.

source.name: BP/DB
source.notes: Self-reported — may be stale or missing.

openFlags.detail: Self-reported revenue may be stale. Consider prompting users to confirm annually.

notes.author: Rob Wegbrands
notes.text: Data gap: Revenue data is self-reported and may not be current.

name: Registered Agent Failure
summary: Failure to maintain a registered agent can result in missed legal notices and loss of good standing.

description.risk: Registered agent has resigned or expired with no replacement designated.
description.impact: Entity may miss service of process, lawsuits, or regulatory notices. Could lose good standing.

red.label: High Risk — No Active RA
red.humanReadable: No active registered agent on file.

yellow.label: Monitor — RA Expiring
yellow.humanReadable: Registered agent subscription expiring within 30 days.

green.label: Low Risk — Active
green.humanReadable: Active registered agent with no expiration concerns.

dataPoints.description: Current status of the entity's registered agent designation.

source.name: BP/DB
source.notes: From LZ Registered Agent subscription data.

name: Founder Equity Split
summary: Undocumented or unequal equity splits lead to founder disputes and cap table chaos.

description.risk: Founders have not formally documented equity split or have informal agreements that may not hold up legally.
description.impact: Costly litigation, inability to raise funding, business shutdown.

red.label: High Risk
red.humanReadable: No cap table or equity split documentation.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Unequal split with no vesting schedule.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Cap table and vesting documented.

name: Personal Liability / Veil Piercing
summary: Commingling funds or ignoring corporate formalities can expose personal assets.

description.risk: Owner mixes personal and business finances or fails to maintain corporate formalities.
description.impact: Courts may disregard LLC/Corp protection, exposing personal assets to business liabilities.

red.label: High Risk
red.humanReadable: No separate business account or annual meeting not held.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Corporate minutes not recorded in over a year.

green.label: Low Risk
green.pseudoFunction: separate_bank_account == true AND annual_meeting_held == true AND minutes_current == true
green.humanReadable: All corporate formalities maintained.

name: Foreign Qualification
summary: Operating in a state without proper foreign qualification creates fines and back-tax exposure.

description.risk: Entity is conducting business in a state where it is not registered as a foreign entity.
description.impact: Fines, back taxes, inability to enforce contracts in that state.

triggers.trigger: Employee or office in new state

red.label: High Risk
red.humanReadable: Operating in states where not registered.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: New state activity detected without registration.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Registered in all states where operating.

name: Contractor Misclassification
summary: Misclassifying employees as contractors creates IRS and labor law exposure.

description.risk: Business is treating W-2 employees as 1099 contractors, violating IRS and labor law rules.
description.impact: Back taxes, penalties, benefits liability, potential class action.

triggers.trigger: High contractor count relative to revenue

red.label: High Risk
red.humanReadable: High contractor ratio with long tenures — probable misclassification.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: High contractor use without proper agreements.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Contractor use is proportionate and properly documented.

name: Cash Flow & Insolvency Risk
summary: Cash flow gaps or insolvency signals may indicate an entity at risk of dissolution.

description.risk: Entity showing signs of financial distress that may lead to insolvency.
description.impact: Business closure, personal liability if formalities not maintained.

red.label: High Risk
red.humanReadable: Less than 1 month runway or multiple payment failures.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Less than 3 months runway or significant revenue decline.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Healthy runway and stable revenue.

name: Dormant Entity Risk
summary: Entities with no activity may still have filing obligations or outstanding liabilities.

description.risk: Owner has stopped using the entity but hasn't formally dissolved it.
description.impact: Ongoing annual report obligations, potential fines, and residual liability.

red.label: High Risk
red.pseudoFunction: IF(last_activity_months > 24 AND dissolution_filed == false AND annual_report_due == true)
red.humanReadable: No activity in 2 years with unfiled obligations.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: No activity in over a year — may be dormant.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Entity is active or properly dissolved.

name: IP Ownership Risk
summary: Unclear IP ownership between founders, employees, or contractors creates ownership disputes and valuation risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: IP created by founders or contractors has not been formally assigned to the entity.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: IP ownership is informal or unclear — assignment agreements may be missing.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All IP is formally assigned to the entity with signed agreements on file.

name: Asset Ownership Cleanup
summary: Business assets held in personal names or without clear title create liability and transfer complications.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Key business assets are held in personal names rather than the entity.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Some assets may be improperly titled — review needed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All significant business assets are properly titled in the entity's name.

name: Founder Personal Guarantees
summary: Founders who personally guarantee business debt expose personal assets if the business defaults.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Founder has unlimited personal guarantees on business obligations.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Founder has personal guarantees — monitoring for exposure.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Personal guarantee exposure is minimal and well-understood.

name: Improper Dissolution
summary: Failure to formally dissolve an entity leaves ongoing obligations and personal liability.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Entity is being wound down without formal dissolution filing.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Entity may be dormant but not formally dissolved.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Entity is either active in good standing or formally dissolved.

name: Sales Tax Non-Compliance
summary: Collecting or remitting sales tax incorrectly creates back-tax, penalties, and audit risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business is collecting or failing to collect/remit sales tax incorrectly.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Sales tax nexus may have changed — review required.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Sales tax obligations are current and properly remitted in all nexus states.

name: Income Tax Underpayment
summary: Failure to make estimated tax payments leads to IRS penalties and unexpected tax bills.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Insufficient estimated tax payments have been made for the current year.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Estimated tax payments may be underfunded based on revenue.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Estimated tax payments are on track and current.

name: Founder Compensation Errors
summary: Improper founder compensation (draws vs. salary) can trigger IRS scrutiny and payroll tax issues.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: S-Corp owner is not paying a reasonable salary, or compensation is improperly structured.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Founder compensation structure may need review for tax compliance.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Founder compensation is properly structured and documented.

name: Payroll Tax Errors
summary: Payroll tax deposit failures and miscalculations lead to IRS trust fund penalties.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Payroll taxes are not being deposited correctly or on time.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Payroll tax compliance needs verification.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Payroll taxes are current and deposited on schedule.

name: Receivables Risk (A/R)
summary: Growing or stale accounts receivable can signal cash flow problems and collection risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Significant overdue receivables with no collection plan in place.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: A/R aging shows some at-risk balances.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: A/R is current and within normal collection cycle.

name: Employment Tax Underpayment
summary: Failure to properly withhold and remit employment taxes creates IRS trust fund penalties.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Employment taxes (FICA, FUTA) not properly withheld or remitted.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Employment tax compliance needs verification.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Employment taxes are properly withheld and remitted.

name: Liquidity Shortfall
summary: Insufficient liquid assets to cover near-term obligations creates operational and solvency risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business has less than 30 days of operating runway.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Cash runway is less than 90 days — monitoring required.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Sufficient cash runway (6+ months) to cover operating obligations.

name: Excess Leverage / Debt Ratio
summary: Excessive debt relative to assets or revenue creates covenant risk and limits future financing options.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Debt-to-equity or debt service coverage ratios exceed safe thresholds.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Leverage ratios are elevated and trending in the wrong direction.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Debt levels are manageable and within healthy ratios.

name: Covenant Breach Risk
summary: Violating loan covenants can trigger immediate repayment demands and damage lender relationships.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: One or more loan covenants have been breached.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Covenant ratios are approaching breach thresholds.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All loan covenants are being met with adequate headroom.

name: Weak Business Credit Profile
summary: Poor business credit limits access to financing and results in worse terms on business obligations.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business credit score is poor or no business credit profile exists.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Business credit profile is thin or improving but not yet strong.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Strong business credit profile with established payment history.

name: Financing Inaccessibility
summary: Inability to access capital when needed can prevent growth or threaten survival.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business has been denied financing or has no established credit facilities.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Access to financing is limited — proactive relationship building needed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Business has access to adequate financing and established credit relationships.

name: Personal Guarantee Exposure During Growth
summary: As the business grows, personal guarantees on business obligations can create outsized personal risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Personal guarantees significantly exceed business assets or ability to repay.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Personal guarantee exposure is growing alongside business obligations.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Personal guarantee exposure is minimal relative to business assets.

name: Wage & Hour Violations
summary: Failure to pay minimum wage, overtime, or correct final pay creates significant legal exposure.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Pay practices do not comply with FLSA or state wage and hour laws.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Pay practices need review for minimum wage and overtime compliance.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Pay practices are fully compliant with federal and state wage laws.

name: Hiring Process Risk
summary: Non-compliant hiring practices (background checks, offer letters, EEO) create discrimination claims.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Hiring practices have material compliance gaps or discrimination risk.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Hiring process may need updates to reflect current legal requirements.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Hiring process is compliant with EEO, FCRA, and applicable state laws.

name: Termination & Retaliation Risk
summary: Improperly documented terminations and retaliation claims create significant employment law exposure.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Recent termination(s) lack proper documentation or show retaliation risk factors.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Termination processes need review for documentation and consistency.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Terminations are properly documented and follow consistent, compliant procedures.

name: Employment Policies
summary: Missing or outdated employee handbook and policies create legal exposure and inconsistent enforcement.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No employee handbook exists or policies are significantly outdated.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Employee policies may need updates for current legal requirements.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Employee handbook is current, legally compliant, and acknowledged by all employees.

name: Workers' Comp Non-Compliance
summary: Operating without required workers' compensation insurance is illegal in most states.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business lacks required workers' compensation coverage.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Workers' comp coverage needs verification for all states of operation.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Workers' compensation coverage is in place for all employees and jurisdictions.

name: Employee & Contractor Contract Gaps
summary: Missing NDAs, IP assignments, and offer letters create disputes and exposure.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Key employees or contractors lack signed agreements (NDA, IP assignment, offer letter).

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Some employees or contractors may be missing required agreements.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All employees and contractors have complete, signed agreements on file.

name: Trademark Protection & Enforcement
summary: Failure to register and enforce trademarks leaves brand vulnerable to infringement and dilution.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Core trademarks are not registered or registration has lapsed.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Trademark registration is pending or not yet filed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Core trademarks are registered, maintained, and actively enforced.

name: Trade Secret Leakage
summary: Inadequate protection of trade secrets risks competitive advantage and legal recourse.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Trade secrets are not adequately protected or NDAs are missing.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Trade secret protection measures need strengthening.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Trade secrets are protected by NDAs, access controls, and documented protocols.

name: Data Privacy Non-Compliance
summary: Violations of CCPA, GDPR, or other privacy regulations create regulatory fines and reputational damage.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business is not compliant with applicable data privacy laws.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Data privacy practices need review for current regulatory requirements.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Business is compliant with all applicable data privacy regulations.

name: Advertising Claims Risk
summary: False or misleading advertising claims create FTC liability and competitor litigation risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Advertising contains unsubstantiated or potentially false claims.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Advertising claims need legal review for compliance.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All advertising claims are substantiated and compliant with FTC guidelines.

name: Copyright Protection
summary: Unregistered copyrights limit remedies and allow competitors to freely copy original work.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Key original works are not copyright-registered, limiting legal remedies.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Copyright registration strategy needs review.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Key original works are registered, providing full statutory damages protection.

name: Customer Contract Gaps
summary: Operating without complete customer agreements creates payment, liability, and IP disputes.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Significant revenue is generated without proper customer contracts.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Customer contracts may be missing key protective provisions.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All customers have complete, enforceable agreements with appropriate protections.

name: Vendor Contract Renewal Risk
summary: Expired or auto-renewing vendor contracts create unexpected obligations and missed renegotiation windows.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Key vendor contracts have expired or are auto-renewing without review.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Vendor contract renewal dates need tracking.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All vendor contracts are current with renewal dates tracked and managed.

name: Platform Dependency Risk
summary: Over-reliance on a single platform (Amazon, Google, Shopify) creates concentration risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business is critically dependent on a single platform that could de-platform or change terms.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Significant revenue concentration in one platform — diversification needed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Revenue is diversified across multiple channels with no critical platform dependency.

name: Commercial Lease Risk
summary: Unfavorable lease terms, personal guarantees, or missed renewal windows create occupancy risk.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Commercial lease has unfavorable terms, is expiring, or has personal guarantee exposure.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Commercial lease renewal window approaching — review needed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Commercial leases are current with favorable terms and tracked renewal dates.

name: Inventory in Other States
summary: Storing inventory in another state may create sales tax nexus and registration requirements.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Inventory stored in another state creating unacknowledged tax nexus.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Inventory locations may be creating nexus in additional states.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: All inventory nexus implications are identified and addressed.

name: 3PL / Warehouse Nexus Triggers
summary: Third-party logistics and warehouse relationships can create tax nexus in states where you don't operate.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: 3PL or warehouse agreements creating unrecognized tax nexus.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: 3PL relationships may be triggering registration or tax obligations.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: 3PL and warehouse nexus implications are fully assessed and addressed.

name: Multi-state Physical Presence
summary: Employees, offices, or operations in additional states create registration, tax, and compliance obligations.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Physical presence in states without proper registration or compliance.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: State footprint may have expanded without corresponding compliance steps.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Registered and compliant in all states where physical presence exists.

name: Vendor Concentration Fragility
summary: Over-reliance on a single supplier creates supply chain risk that can halt operations.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Critical operations depend on a single vendor with no backup.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Vendor concentration is elevated — contingency planning needed.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Vendor base is diversified with backup suppliers for critical inputs.

name: General Liability Coverage Gap
summary: Operating without adequate general liability insurance exposes the business to catastrophic loss from claims.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No general liability coverage or coverage is significantly insufficient.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: General liability coverage limits may be inadequate for current operations.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Adequate general liability coverage is in place for all business activities.

name: EPLI Coverage Gap
summary: Employment Practices Liability Insurance (EPLI) protects against wrongful termination and discrimination claims.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No EPLI coverage in place despite having employees.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: EPLI coverage needs review for adequacy.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: EPLI coverage is in place with appropriate limits for workforce size.

name: Cyber Insurance Gap
summary: Data breaches and ransomware attacks without cyber insurance create uninsured catastrophic losses.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No cyber insurance in place — significant exposure to ransomware and data breach costs.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Cyber insurance coverage needs review for adequacy.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Cyber insurance is in place with appropriate limits and breach response coverage.

name: Professional Liability Gap (E&O)
summary: Errors & Omissions insurance protects service businesses from client claims of professional mistakes.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No professional liability coverage for service-based business activities.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: E&O coverage needs review for adequacy.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Adequate E&O coverage is in place for all professional services offered.

name: Directors & Officers (D&O) Gap
summary: D&O insurance protects directors and officers from personal liability for business decisions.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No D&O coverage — directors and officers exposed to personal liability.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: D&O coverage needs review for board composition and risk.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Adequate D&O coverage is in place protecting all directors and officers.

name: Commercial Property Coverage Gap
summary: Property and equipment losses without insurance can be catastrophic for asset-heavy businesses.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: Business property is uninsured or significantly underinsured.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Property insurance coverage may not reflect current asset values.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Commercial property is fully insured at replacement cost value.

name: Business Interruption Coverage Gap
summary: Business interruption insurance covers lost revenue during forced closures — often overlooked until needed.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No business interruption coverage — forced closure would mean zero revenue.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Business interruption coverage needs review for adequacy.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Business interruption coverage is in place with adequate revenue replacement limits.

name: Product Liability Coverage Gap
summary: Product-based businesses without product liability insurance face catastrophic exposure from injury claims.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No product liability coverage for physical products sold to customers.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Product liability coverage needs review for current product lines.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Product liability coverage is in place for all products with adequate limits.

name: Fidelity Bond Insurance
summary: Fidelity bonds protect against employee theft and fraud — often required by clients or contracts.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No fidelity bond in place — exposure to employee theft and fraud losses.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Fidelity bond coverage needs review.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Fidelity bond is in place with coverage appropriate for business size.

name: Key Person Insurance
summary: Loss of a founder or key employee without key person insurance can threaten business survival.

red.label: High Risk — Action Required
red.humanReadable: No key person insurance on founder(s) or critical employees.

yellow.label: Monitor
yellow.humanReadable: Key person insurance coverage needs review.

green.label: Low Risk
green.humanReadable: Key person insurance is in place for all founders and critical personnel.
